name: Video Importer
description: Import video frames into the GD level editor as pixel art.

Frames.name: Frame Settings
Frames.description: Options for how frames are imported.

frame-limit.name: Frame limit
frame-limit.description: Max number of frames to import from the video. Higher values can cause lag on weaker devices.

frame-spacing.name: Frame spacing
frame-spacing.description: Horizontal gap between each frame placed in the editor (in units).

Pixels.name: Pixel Settings
Pixels.description: Options for how pixels are placed.

colour-channel.name: Colour channel
colour-channel.description: The colour channel used for the placed pixel objects. It's best to leave this at the default.

pixel-size.name: Pixel size
pixel-size.description: Size of each pixel block in the editor.

Safety.name: Safety
Safety.description: Options to keep things from exploding.

size-limit.name: Pixel limit per frame
size-limit.description: Max number of pixels per frame. Raising this too high can crash the game.

disable-limit.name: Remove pixel limit
disable-limit.description: Removes the per-frame pixel limit. Not recommended unless you know what you're doing, it can crash the game on large videos.
